name: Legendary Hurricane Jet-Vac
description: Legendary Hurricane Jet-Vac is the Legendary counterpart of Hurricane Jet-Vac in Skylanders: SuperChargers.
biography: For centuries, Skylanders have competed in gladiator-style events inside epic arenas of sport, where only the greatest of combatants become immortalized as magical, golden statues that stand watch as guardians. These are the Legendary Skylanders. Whenever the world is in peril, special Portal Masters can bring these statues to life and summon the Legendary Skylanders to defend Skylands against any evil that threatens it.
personality: Jet-Vac is a noble and disciplined Sky Baron who takes his responsibilities as a Skylander very seriously. He is brave, loyal, and adheres strictly to a code of honor, though his serious nature is often contrasted by his high-flying heroic antics.

story.content: As a Legendary Skylander, Hurricane Jet-Vac has proven himself in the arenas of sport, earning a golden statue in his honor. He was called upon to join the SuperChargers to stop Kaos's latest plot involving the Sky Eater.

trivia: He is the second Legendary counterpart of Jet-Vac, making Jet-Vac the first Skylander to have two Legendary counterparts.
His design features a blue and gold color scheme typical of Legendary Skylanders.

trailers.name: Skylanders SuperChargers: Legendary Hurricane Jet-Vac Trailer

gameplay: Legendary Hurricane Jet-Vac utilizes a high-powered vacuum gun and a specialized flight suit. He can blast compressed air at enemies, suck them into his turbine for damage, and perform quick aerial dashes to avoid incoming attacks.

basic.name: Shooting the Breeze
basic.content: Fire a blast of compressed air from the vacuum gun.

basic.name: Jet Turbine Vacuum
basic.content: Suck in enemies and debris with the powerful vacuum turbine.

basic_upgrades.name: Somer-Assault
basic_upgrades.content: Perform an aerial somersault that knocks back enemies.

soulgems.name: Eagle-Air Battery
soulgems.content: Increases the duration and power of the vacuum suction.

abilities.name: Category Pain
abilities.content: The vacuum suction creates a powerful vortex that deals massive damage.
